articles.title: CVE-2024-7083 — CVSS 3.5
articles.summary: The Email Encoder  WordPress plugin before 2.3.4 does not sanitise and escape some of its settings, which could allow high privilege users such as admin to perform Stored Cross-Site Scripting attacks even when the unfiltered_html capability is disallowed (for example in multisite setup).

articles.title: CVE-2026-6601 — CVSS 4.3
articles.summary: A vulnerability has been found in Lagom WHMCS Template up to 2.4.2. This impacts an unknown function of the component Datatables. The manipulation leads to resource consumption. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32965 — CVSS 7.5
articles.summary: Initialization of a resource with an insecure default vulnerability exists in SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. When the affected device is connected to the network with the initial (factory-default) configuration, the device can be configured with the null string password.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32963 — CVSS 6.1
articles.summary: SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. contain a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability. When a user logs in to the affected device and access some crafted web page, arbitrary script may be executed on the user's browser.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32962 — CVSS 5.3
articles.summary: SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. contain a missing authentication for critical function issue. The device configuration may be altered without authentication.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32960 — CVSS 6.5
articles.summary: SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. contain an issue with a sensitive information in resource not removed before reuse.  An attacker may login to the device without knowing the password by sending a crafted packet.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32957 — CVSS 5.3
articles.summary: SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. contain a missing authentication for critical function issue on firmware maintenance. Arbitrary file may be uploaded on the device without authentication.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32956 — CVSS 9.8
articles.summary: SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in processing the redirect URLs. Arbitrary code may be executed on the device.

articles.title: CVE-2026-32955 — CVSS 8.8
articles.summary: SD-330AC and AMC Manager provided by silex technology, Inc. contain a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in processing the redirect URLs. Arbitrary code may be executed on the device.

articles.title: CVE-2026-20122: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs Vulnerability
articles.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an incorrect use of privileged APIs vulnerability due to improper file handling on the API interface of an affected system. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading a malicious file on the local file system. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to overwrite arbitrary files on the affected system and gain vmanage user privileges. Affe

articles.title: CVE-2026-20133: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor Vulnerability
articles.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to view sensitive information on affected systems. Affected product: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager by Cisco. Required action: Please adhere to CISA’s guidelines to assess exposure and mitigate risks associated with Cisco SD-WAN devices as outlines in CISA’s

articles.title: CVE-2025-2749: Kentico Xperience Path Traversal Vulnerability
articles.summary: Kentico Xperience contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated user's Staging Sync Server to upload arbitrary data to path relative locations. Affected product: Kentico Xperience by Kentico. articles.title: CVE-2023-27351: PaperCut NG/MF Improper Authentication Vulnerability
articles.summary: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class. articles.summary: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the user's session, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive information. articles.title: CVE-2026-20128: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Storing Passwords in a Recoverable Format Vulnerability
articles.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a storing passwords in a recoverable format vulnerability that allows an authenticated, local attacker to gain DCA user privileges by accessing a credential file for the DCA user on the filesystem as a low-privileged user. articles.title: CVE-2025-32975: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) Improper Authentication Vulnerability
articles.summary: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow attackers to impersonate legitimate users without valid credentials. Required action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product

articles.title: CVE-2024-27199: JetBrains TeamCity Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability
articles.summary: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed. Affected product: TeamCity by JetBrains. Required action: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

articles.title: CVE-2026-41242 — CVSS 9.8
articles.summary: protobufjs compiles protobuf definitions into JavaScript (JS) functions. In versions prior to 8.0.1 and 7.5.5, attackers can inject arbitrary code in the "type" fields of protobuf definitions, which will then execute during object decoding using that definition. Versions 8.0.1 and 7.5.5 patch the issue.

articles.title: Critical flaw in Protobuf library enables JavaScript code execution
articles.summary: Proof-of-concept exploit code has been published for a critical remote code execution flaw in protobuf.js, a widely used JavaScript implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers. [...]

This is due to the shortcode rendering path passing attacker-controlled class input into a fallback image builder that concatenates HTML attributes without proper escaping.
